environment.server: reused :3001 (claude-cli configured; confirmed via scan-stream provider event)
environment.constraint: Next.js 16 single-dev-server-per-project — could not start a dedicated L2 server alongside :3001
environment.blocker: shared dev server wedged under machine load (~25 parallel claude --dangerously-skip-permissions sessions + ~60 node procs); swr live scan exceeded the 150s CLAUDE_CLI_TIMEOUT_MS and fell back to mock, then /api/health went unresponsive
environment.cleanup: killed only the 1 headless scan child (-p --output-format json); the 25 interactive sessions and the operator's dev server were left untouched / not restarted

findings.title: Default mock path confirms the L1-predicted floor on a live scan
findings.got: swr mock scan: engine.provider=mock, discrepancies=[] (0), roadmap=catalog template ('Agent guidance is thin', 'AI isn't in the loop yet', 'AI use is ad hoc'), D2=100 (signal verbatim)
findings.expected: the credibility-bearing LLM layer (discrepancies, repo-specific roadmap) is absent on the default path

findings.title: claude-cli engine works headlessly (subscription auth)
findings.got: direct `claude -p --output-format json --model sonnet` (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) returned valid JSON in ~1.9s

findings.title: Live claude-cli scan-quality comparison not completed (env-blocked, not a product defect)
findings.expected: live scan: non-empty re-traceable discrepancies, repo-specific roadmap, LLM-corrected D2, gate provider=claude, reconciling scores
findings.got: not captured — shared dev server wedged under load; engine proven healthy separately
findings.l2_priority: re-run on a quiet dedicated server, small repo, one scan at a time; diff vs swr-mock.json
